desc: The PC emerges from the vats as a complete form, without defect.
The PC appears ashen-skinned and gray-eyed.
Flesh is covered in overlapping plates. Base AC 11, but -1 penalty to physical checks (climb, jump, etc.). Roll 1d4 for type: (1) feathers; (2) scales; (3) chitin; (4) steel.
The PC suffers from a compelling indigestion.
The PC’s facial features are slack and limpid.
The vat-thing has a fundamental yearning. Roll 1d4 for type: (1) knowledge; (2) love; (3) beauty; (4) truth.
Wracked by memories of a previous existence. The vat-thing suffers a -1 penalty to initiative rolls.
Uncontrolled bouts of muscle spasms, resulting in a -5’ speed penalty.
The PC must sleep for twice as long as others to gain the benefits of a full night’s rest.
Visual overlay between this world and another. Roll 1d4: (1) La-Er; (2) Kalu; (3) Overworld; (4) Jangk. -1 penalty to any action requiring vision.
The PC suffers from aches at a specific time of day. Roll 1d4: (1) morning; (2) evening; (3) noon; (4) before storms.
Infused with the light of the dying sun. +1 bonus to all attempts to hide in wilderness settings.
The PC’s eyes flash in the darkness; -2 penalty to all attempts to hide.
Seeps a pus-like substance that gums up eyelids when asleep, requiring a full round to clear upon waking.
Any creature touched by the vat-thing suffers 1 hit point of cold damage per round.
Leftover vat-tissue extending from the body. The PC suffers a +1d penalty to all fumble rolls.
The PC has an over-large head and cannot wear normal helmets.
The PC can only digest soft or semi-liquid foods.
Differently colored areas of skin that contrast dramatically with their neighbors.
Roll 1d4 for type: (1-2) arm; (3-4) leg. -1 penalty to physical checks (climb, jump, swim, etc.).
The PC is 50% heavier than average, requiring specially-fitted clothing and armor.
Boneless creature with pulsing brain exposed. Permanent -1 Strength and -1 Personality (applied after pattern mods).
The PC suffers a permanent loss of -1 Agility (applied after pattern mods).
Permanently loses 1 point of Stamina and Personality due to the strain of coming to life.
Glassy-skinned; suffers double damage from fire-based attacks.
Beautiful body with intestines trailing out like seeking fibrils. -2 penalty to Personality-based checks.
The vat-thing is covered with eyes. -2d penalty to all Personality-based checks.
The PC emerged inside-out. -3d penalty to all Personality-based checks.
Must make a Will save vs DC of a person's Personality upon meeting or be consumed by hatred for them.
Flesh falls off in chunks. Lose 1d4 HP per day; only magical healing staves off decay.
Roll again twice, ignoring any duplicate results.
